name: mostMsgEncodeRLE
title: mostMsgEncodeRLE
syntax: long mostMsgEncodeRLE(mostAmsMessage * msg, long fktIds[], long size)
description: mostMsgEncodeRLE() encodes a list of function IDs and saves it in the data area of a message. Run Length Encoding in accordance with MOST Specification 2.4 Para. 2.3.9 is used. This function is suitable for compiling messages of the FBlock.FktIds.Status type.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message, which is to have data input into it.
